_source: DoD Defense Travel Management Office - BAH Rate Tables effective January 1, 2026; national average increase of 4.2% announced Dec 11, 2025
_note: Rates are monthly USD. Columns include enlisted (E-1..E-9), warrant (W-1..W-5), officer w/ >4yrs prior enlisted (O-1E..O-3E), and officer (O-1..O-7). 'withDep' = with dependents, 'noDep' = without. BAH is non-taxable. Entries flagged `"inferred": true` were derived by applying the 4.2% national average increase to the 2025 DTMO anchor for that MHA and expanding using the standard inter-grade multiplier profile. Use the DTMO BAH Calculator for authoritative lookups.

_coverage.gaps: Approximately 299 MHAs exist nationwide in 2026. This dataset covers the highest-population MHAs plus regional state capitals. Entries not included (smaller ARS, remote DoD sites, overseas OHA locations) require the DTMO lookup. ZIP coverage is contiguous for listed bases' counties but is not exhaustive for every ZIP in the continental US.
